replies.msg:
我地人工主要由ground duty+block hour+allowance組成

由briefing time 到engine on計ground duty (hourly)
Engine on 到engine off 計block hour(hourly)
去到外站會有allowance(hotel based)
所以就算飛同一個外站都有可能住唔同酒店而有不同allowance

而Ground duty pay係block hour既一半
補充返上面ground duty仲有engine off到engine off後30分鐘
